isHub.description: When true, this host runs an oci-lxc-deployer Hub and this deployer acts as a Spoke against it. Requires hubApiUrl.

hubApiUrl.description: Full URL of the Hub's HTTP(S) API, e.g. https://old-prod-hub:3443 — has no default, the SSH hostname is usually NOT the Hub's API URL.

hubCaFingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the Hub's TLS CA, captured on first trust (TOFU). If absent, the UI prompts for trust on next connect.
